rationale: Integer overflow serializing >2.8GB via Position type; internal implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Seed hostnames differ from RS-advertised hostnames; NodeJS mentioned diagnostically. Connectivity/DNS issue, no specific spec rule named.
Pre-create common BsonValue instances to reduce GC pressure; internal performance optimization, no spec involvement.
StackOverflow serializing JObject via IEnumerable<C> recursion; internal serializer bug, no spec rule violated.
All seeds must succeed on initial connect; NodeJS mentioned diagnostically. Cannot name specific SDAM rule violated.
StringSerializer fails when Id member represented as ObjectId; internal type-mapping bug, no spec rule.
Aggregate project to top-level enumerable deserializes incorrectly; internal LINQ/aggregation projection bug.
RFC-defined Kerberos byte-count checks break in some environments; platform compatibility workaround, not a MongoDB spec rule.
Nested LINQ Select generates illegal $pull; thin description, internal LINQ translation bug.
LINQ grouping requires Sort to produce correct results; internal aggregation pipeline translation bug.
Unknown discriminator exception in polymorphic deserialization; internal BSON serializer threading/caching bug.
Documentation update: BsonValues no longer accept nulls in ctors is an undocumented breaking change.
C# bulk insert degrades over time vs. JavaScript shell; performance investigation, no spec rule.
Replace MD5 machine key with FIPS-compliant alternative; internal security improvement, no spec rule.
LINQ $group Sum ignores custom decimal serializer for result type; internal LINQ/aggregation bug.
32-bit integer overflow in ByteBufferStream and MultiChunkBuffer; internal buffer implementation bug.
SHA256Managed is not FIPS-140 validated; use SHA256CryptoServiceProvider instead. Internal security fix.
Explicitly says to implement all formats in MongoDB extended JSON spec; missing spec-required reading formats.
API documentation website styling improvement; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Bulk upsert InsertedCount=0; reporter uses old driver 1.10.0. InsertedCount=0 for upserts may be correct per spec.
LINQ FieldDefinition fails to partially evaluate captured variable in array index; internal expression evaluation bug.
Re-enable Ping in async MongoClient API; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
F# manually-constructed lambda fails in IndexKeys.Ascending; LINQ expression tree handling bug.
User asks why DistinctAsync lacks Sort/ToList; user confusion about API design, not a bug.
User confused that GetDatabase doesn't create DB immediately; expected MongoDB lazy-creation behavior.
ObjectSerializer fails when _t and _v appear in different order; driver-internal discriminator field ordering bug.
Description explicitly states 'CRUD spec states that FindOptions should have an optional OplogReplay boolean property.'
Runtime exception when projecting a subdocument field via Aggregate; internal LINQ/aggregation deserialization bug.
Refactor BsonValue IConvertible to use virtual dispatch; internal code quality improvement, no behavior change.
ObjectId internal representation uses 14 bytes instead of 12; internal memory layout optimization.
Integrate BSON driver with Json.NET serialization attributes; third-party library integration feature.
Distinct sends null query field instead of omitting it; wire-level cleanup but no specific spec rule cited.
Explicitly cites server selection spec: primary read preference must succeed when ConnectionMode is Direct.
Explicitly cites server selection spec: RunCommandAsync must use primary read preference, not WriteCommandOperation.
NullReferenceException deserializing immutable class with extra elements; internal constructor-based deserialization bug.
Timing-safe hash comparison improvement; security best practice, Depends DRIVERS-255 but not a spec rule.
Improve bulk write reference documentation; docs-only change, no driver behavior.
User confused that updating a top-level doc does not update an embedded sub-document copy; not a driver bug.
User question about creating a unique index and performance implications; support question, not a bug.
User question about retrieving generated ObjectId after InsertOneAsync; user confusion, not a bug.
Description links directly to command monitoring specification; driver had not implemented the spec at all.

InsertOneAsync returns Task not WriteResult; API design ergonomics discussion, not a spec violation.
LINQ Any predicate omits parent field prefix in rendered query; internal LINQ expression rendering bug.
SDAM spec: hidden RS members must not be classified as secondaries; driver incorrectly recognizes them as such.
Implement connection string spec test runner; Depends DRIVERS-248. Test infrastructure, not a driver behavior fix.

LINQ Count() throws InvalidOperationException on empty result instead of returning 0; LINQ translation bug.
NullReferenceException on Query/GetMore failure; thin description, implementation bug.
IPv6 connection regression; socket address family mismatch in TCP stream factory, internal connectivity bug.
